title: S.R. Batliboi is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: S.R. Batliboi is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
S.R. Batliboi is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About S.R. Batliboi:
S.R. Batliboi is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.R. Batliboi!
